calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

ROBERT L. BACHMAN, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK,
Plaintiff's Witness: WALTER GIBBS was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) WILLIAM VOIGT for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $54,048.45
Attorney's Fees - $7000.
Costs - $450.
Total judgment in the amount of $61,498.45

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2011 Continued To Jun-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
